context: Tests whether the agent designs the gift card database schema using an append-only ledger pattern with two tables, correct column types, a case-insensitive unique index on the code, and no stored balance column.

checklist.name: Two separate tables
checklist.description: Schema includes two distinct tables: one for gift card records and one for transactions/ledger entries (not combined into one table, not using a single 'balance' column)

checklist.name: No stored balance column
checklist.description: The gift card table does NOT contain a 'balance' or 'current_balance' column — balance is derived only from summing transactions

checklist.name: Code column uniqueness
checklist.description: The gift card code field is declared UNIQUE (or has a unique constraint) on the gift cards table

checklist.name: Amounts as integer cents
checklist.description: Monetary amount fields (initial_value, transaction amount) are defined as INTEGER (not DECIMAL, FLOAT, or NUMERIC with scale > 0), representing cents

checklist.name: Foreign key on transactions
checklist.description: The transactions table has a card_id column with a foreign key reference to the gift cards table's primary key

checklist.name: Transaction amount sign semantics
checklist.description: The transactions table amount column comment or schema indicates positive = credit (issuance/reload) and negative = debit (redemption), OR the schema/code shows this sign convention in use

checklist.name: Transaction type constraint
checklist.description: The transactions table type column uses a CHECK constraint (or enum) limiting values to exactly: 'issue', 'redeem', 'reload', 'refund', 'void', 'expiration' — no fewer and no additional values

checklist.name: Case-insensitive code index
checklist.description: A unique index is created on UPPER(code) (or a case-insensitive expression) rather than on the raw code column

checklist.name: Descending transaction index
checklist.description: An index exists on the transactions table keyed by (card_id, created_at DESC) or equivalent — enabling fast per-card transaction lookups in reverse chronological order

checklist.name: is_active flag
checklist.description: The gift cards table includes an is_active (or equivalent active/enabled) boolean column defaulting to true
